title: Jamaican Coconut Dumplings
description: A gluten-free take on traditional Caribbean dumplings. These flavorful bite-sized treats are made with coconut and Jamaican spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine coconut flour, Jamaican allspice, and crushed Jamaican pepper.
Gradually add coconut oil and coconut milk to the dry ingredients, mixing until a dough forms.
Add dumplings to the dough and knead until they are fully coated.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a dumpling shape.
Place dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until dumplings are lightly golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
